# Summary

Bouchon du Centre, a French restaurant in Amsterdam's city center, is closing after 27 years of operation. The owner expressed that while they'll miss the regular customers, they won't miss Amsterdam itself, suggesting a bittersweet end to the establishment. Visitors to Amsterdam looking for a long-standing French dining spot will need to find alternatives, as this classic restaurant is no longer an option.
